prd_refs: §6.3 — git context is part of the prompt context payload.
description: When inside a git repository, surface branch, dirty flag, upstream, and a small commit-summary so the planner can phrase prompts like "show changed files in this repo" intelligently. Inclusion is gated on `context.includeGitContext = true` (default true).
notes: Avoid issuing slow git commands; one-line calls only.
steps: TDD: Outside a repo, returns `$null` (no error).
TDD: Inside a clean repo, returns object with `branch`, `dirty = $false`, `upstream`.
TDD: Inside a dirty repo, returns `dirty = $true`.
TDD: Function does not run when `git` is not on PATH; returns `$null` with a warning.
Author `Private/Context/Get-GitContext.ps1` invoking `git -C $PWD rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree`, branch via `git symbolic-ref --short HEAD`, dirty via `git status --porcelain`.
Tests mock `git` invocation through a thin wrapper (`Invoke-GitCli`) so platform behaviour is irrelevant.
name: [ctx-04] Git repository context
